name: golang-github-hashicorp-go-uuid-dev
title: golang-github-hashicorp-go-uuid-dev
summary: generate UUID-format strings using high quality random bytes
description:
generate UUID-format strings using high quality random bytes
Generates UUID-format strings using high quality, purely random bytes.
It can also parse UUID-format strings into their component bytes.
